checks.remediation: Open a PR, push to main, or manually dispatch the workflow; a feature-branch push alone does not trigger it. Retain the judge-linux-amd64 artifact and update this record with run URL and image ID.

checks.reason: The Dockerfile and publisher target arm64, but no arm64 container was executed
checks.remediation: Publish the multi-architecture image and verify the arm64 manifest on a native runner.

decision: Native macOS offline and UI delivery are evidenced. The pinned Godot toolchain is installed but needs a fresh P4 acceptance record; live OpenAI, Linux container/Godot execution, native arm64, and image publication remain unverified, so P4.8 and G4 cannot pass yet.
